actions.name: Wavebound
actions.description: This creature's @Trait[earthbound] attacks can also be used while submerged/on-top of a body of Water, in which case the 'Ground' connection counts for any creature submerged/on-top of the water, including any method of transportation keeping a creature afloat, such as a boat or giant lily pad.

system.description: This creature's @Trait[earthbound] attacks can also be used while submerged/on-top of a body of Water, in which case the 'Ground' connection counts for any creature submerged/on-top of the water, including any method of transportation keeping a creature afloat, such as a boat or giant lily pad.
